task: Convert React-based prototype at project/index.html into production-ready static index.html at project root

stories.title: Create static HTML structure matching all sections from prototype
acceptanceCriteria: index.html exists at project root (/Users/matthieu/Documents/Dev/matthieu-driss/index.html)
All 15 sections rendered as static HTML: Hero, Problem, HiddenCost, Offer, Compare, Audited, Deliverables, Method, ForWhom, Cases, Implementation, Credibility, FAQ, ContactForm, FinalCTA
Navigation bar with 6 links + CTA button present and sticky
Footer with copyright, contact, FAQ, email, LinkedIn links present
All French text content matches prototype exactly
No React, ReactDOM, or Babel CDN script tags
No JSX or type='text/babel' script tags

stories.title: Preserve all CSS styling with existing design tokens
acceptanceCriteria: styles.css linked or inlined with all existing design tokens (--bg, --ink, --accent, etc.)
IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono fonts loaded from Google Fonts
All responsive breakpoints preserved (880px, 720px, 560px, etc.)
Scroll progress bar at top of page
Density compact/regular/comfy classes supported
Scroll-reveal animations preserved via CSS classes
All hover/transition effects on cards, buttons, nav preserved

stories.title: Implement vanilla JavaScript for all interactive elements
acceptanceCriteria: FAQ accordion opens/closes on click with plus/minus animation
Scroll progress bar updates on scroll
Nav shrinks on scroll (is-scrolled class)
Sections reveal on scroll via IntersectionObserver (is-in class)
Contact form captures data and shows success message on submit
CTA buttons have magnetic hover effect
Smooth scroll for anchor links
No console errors in browser

stories.title: Verify page loads and renders correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Page loads without JavaScript errors
All sections visible and properly styled
Responsive layout works at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1200px)
CSS animations and transitions work correctly
Page is self-contained (no CDN dependencies for core functionality)
All navigation links scroll to correct sections
